zh.title: 手绘小熊 · 灵感萌芽
zh.desc: 在草稿纸上勾勒出的第一只小熊，它代表着创意、求知与无限的可能。

en.title: Hand-drawn Bear · Budding Inspiration
en.desc: The first bear sketched on draft paper, representing creativity, pursuit of knowledge, and infinite possibilities.

zh.title: 佳期如许 · 韶华筑梦
zh.desc: 校园里最宁静、惬意的角落。这里记录着清晨的晨读和傍晚的深思。

en.title: Beautiful Days · Dreaming of Youth
en.desc: The most peaceful and cozy corner in the campus. It records the morning readings and evening reflections.

zh.title: 林荫大道 · 朝阳晨曦
zh.desc: 清晨第一缕阳光穿过林荫，洒在通往教学楼的道路上，伴随书声朗朗。

en.title: Boulevard in Morning Light
en.desc: The first morning light shines through the trees on the path to the teaching building, accompanied by sounds of study.

zh.title: 湖畔倒影 · 水光潋滟
zh.desc: 波光粼粼的湖面上倒映着图书馆的身影。微风拂过，泛起层层涟漪。

en.title: Lakeside Reflection
en.desc: The library is reflected on the shimmering lake. A breeze brushes past, creating ripples on the water.

zh.title: 自习室的一隅
zh.desc: 阳光静静洒在铺满参考书的书桌上。安静、专心致志的午后求学时光。

en.title: Corner of the Study Room
en.desc: Sunshine quietly blankets the desk full of reference books. A quiet, dedicated afternoon of learning.

zh.title: 实验室之夜 · 霓虹绽放
zh.desc: 夜深了，实验仪器旁的指示灯仍在闪烁。这是探索真知、通宵达旦的夜晚。

en.title: Lab Night · Glowing Tech
en.desc: Deep in the night, indicator lights on laboratory equipment still blink. An overnight journey seeking truth.

zh.title: 斑驳红砖 · 历史回音
zh.desc: 教学老楼的红砖墙壁，爬满了常春藤。每一块砖石都承载着学术积淀与传承。

en.title: Ivy on Red Bricks
en.desc: The old teaching building's red brick walls are covered with ivy. Every brick carries academic legacy.

zh.title: 落叶知秋 · 黄金长廊
zh.desc: 秋天如期而至，金黄的银杏叶铺满了校道。踩在上面发出清脆的响声，美不胜收。

en.title: Golden Autumn Pathway
en.desc: Autumn arrives as scheduled, with golden ginkgo leaves covering the campus paths. Beautiful to walk on.

zh.title: 樱花大道 · 春日絮语
zh.desc: 春暖花开，粉嫩的樱花如期盛放，连微风中都带着甜甜的春天气息。

en.title: Cherry Blossom Boulevard
en.desc: Spring brings cherry blossoms in full bloom, filling the breeze with sweet scent of spring.

zh.title: 阶梯教室 · 知识殿堂
zh.desc: 在宽敞的阶梯教室里，教授滔滔不绝，黑板上写满了推导公式，思维碰撞在空中。

en.title: Lecture Hall · Hall of Wisdom
en.desc: In the spacious lecture hall, professors present eloquently, blackboards filled with formulae.

zh.title: 学术讨论 · 灵感碰撞
zh.desc: 课后大家聚在自习室里，针对一个难题热烈辩论，在白板上涂抹出灵感的蓝图。

en.title: Academic Brainstorming
en.desc: Gathering around the whiteboard after class to debate a hard problem, sketching out ideas.

zh.title: 图书馆穹顶 · 智慧之光
zh.desc: 抬头仰望图书馆高耸的圆形穹顶，天光洒落在层层叠叠的书架上，浩瀚且神圣。

en.title: Library Dome · Light of Wisdom
en.desc: Looking up at the library's high dome, sunlight showers down upon tiers of bookshelves.

zh.title: 草坪吉他 · 歌声嘹亮
zh.desc: 午后暖阳里，三五好友围坐在大草坪上，弹起吉他，唱着关于理想与远方的歌。

en.title: Lawn Melodies
en.desc: Under the warm afternoon sun, friends gather on the grass to play guitar and sing of dreams.

zh.title: 夜跑跑道 · 挥洒汗水
zh.desc: 夜晚的操场灯火通明，在晚风中一圈圈奔跑，释放一整天学术科研的压力。

en.title: Night Running Track
en.desc: The track lit up at night, running lap after lap in the cool breeze to sweat away the stress.

zh.title: 学术沙龙 · 专家视野
zh.desc: 参加业内大咖的学术交流沙龙，听取最前沿的研究进展，拓宽自己的学术边界。

en.title: Academic Seminar
en.desc: Attending academic forums led by industry masters to broaden academic horizons.

zh.title: 代码重构 · 逻辑精炼
zh.desc: 电脑屏幕上整齐规范的一行行代码。精益求精，不断优化系统的性能与架构。

en.title: Code Refactoring
en.desc: Lines of beautiful code organized on the screen, constantly optimizing performance and logic.

zh.title: 期末备考 · 挑灯夜战
zh.desc: 期末周的凌晨两点，台灯下勾画满重点的课本，见证了每一次不懈努力的付出。

en.title: Midnight Exam Prep
en.desc: At 2 AM during exam week, textbooks highlighted under desk lamps witness relentless effort.

zh.title: 论文撰写 · 句句斟酌
zh.desc: 屏幕上的文字不断修改扩充。引经据典、推导逻辑，只为了交出一份完美的答卷。

en.title: Thesis Writing Process
en.desc: Drafting and editing thesis paragraphs carefully, reasoning logically for a perfect final paper.

zh.title: 答辩准备 · 沉着冷静
zh.desc: 反复模拟幻灯片的演示，调整语速与核心逻辑。为毕业前的最后一关做足准备。

en.title: Defense Practice
en.desc: Practicing presentation slides repeatedly, managing speed and focus for the final challenge.

zh.title: 毕业作品展示
zh.desc: 将大学四年来的心血结晶，陈列在宽阔的展示大厅，收获了老师与同学们的一致好评。

en.title: Graduation Showcase
en.desc: Showcasing four years of hard work in the grand hall, receiving praises from teachers and peers.

zh.title: 重聚校门 · 历久弥新
zh.desc: 站在宏伟挺拔的学校大门前合影。岁月轮转，我们依然是那个鲜衣怒马的少年。

en.title: Reunion at the Campus Gate
en.desc: Group photo in front of the grand campus gate. Time flies, yet our passionate hearts remain.

zh.title: 拨穗礼成 · 青春加冕
zh.desc: 合上证书的那一刻，拨穗礼成。头顶的学士帽飞向蓝天，承载着少年的前程锦绣。

en.title: The Tassel Flip · Graduation Day
en.desc: The moment the tassel is flipped. Mortarboards fly into the blue sky, carrying a bright future.

zh.title: 学位证书 · 沉甸甸的爱
zh.desc: 大红色的证书捧在手心，分量极重。这是四年求索之路上，最完满的交代与句点。

en.title: Degree Certificate
en.desc: Holding the red certificate in hand. This is the most fulfilling milestone of the four-year path.

zh.title: 毕业晚会 · 璀璨星河
zh.desc: 毕业晚会的舞台上灯光璀璨，大家挥舞着荧光棒，在歌声中向这段无悔的青春告别。

en.title: Graduation Gala Night
en.desc: A bright stage at the graduation gala, waving glow sticks and bidding farewell to youth.

zh.title: 再见宿舍 · 空白记忆
zh.desc: 行李箱已打包带走，曾经温馨喧闹的小屋，重新回归了最初的空旷。再见，我的舍友们。

en.title: Farewell Dormitory
en.desc: Suitcases packed away, the warm room is empty once again. Farewell, my dear roommates.

zh.title: 合影纪念 · 定格瞬间
zh.desc: 大家穿着学士服肩并肩靠在一起。快门按下的刹那，时间将我们最灿烂的笑容永远留存。

en.title: Graduation Group Photo
en.desc: Standing shoulder to shoulder in graduation gowns. The shutter clicks, locking our smiles forever.

zh.title: 夕阳晚霞 · 离别钟声
zh.desc: 夕阳将天空染成了玫瑰金色，最后一面打卡校园的地标。挥挥手，不带走一片云彩。

en.title: Sunset Horizon · Departure Toll
en.desc: The sunset paints the sky in rose gold, our final photo spot on campus. Waving goodbye softly.

zh.title: 未来之约 · 扬帆远航
zh.desc: 站在全新的人生起点，行囊里装满了知识、友谊与回忆。向着星辰大海，我们即刻启航。

en.title: Promise of Future · Sail On
en.desc: At a brand new starting point, suitcases filled with knowledge and memories. Sailing to the deep sea.

zh.title: 恩师寄语 · 终身受用
zh.desc: 临行前，导师微笑着拍了拍我的肩膀，送上最真挚的叮嘱与祝福。这份厚爱将常伴心间。

en.title: Mentor's Blessing
en.desc: Before departure, the mentor patted my shoulder, offering the sincerest blessings. Deeply cherished.

zh.title: 星光璀璨 · 前程似锦
zh.desc: 最后一晚，整个校区亮起星光。祝愿所有毕业生在未来的道路上都能如星河般璀璨，前程似锦。

en.title: Bright Starlight · Brighter Future
en.desc: Under the starry night sky on our final evening, wishing all graduates a future as bright as the galaxy.
